message:
fix: remove dedup capacity guard that silently disabled deduplication (gt-0own)

When the dedup map hit maxSize, AlreadyProcessed() returned false but
did NOT record the message ID. Every subsequent new message at capacity
bypassed dedup entirely, allowing duplicate processing of protocol
messages (POLECAT_DONE, etc.) under sustained load.

Fix: remove the capacity check. 10k string keys is negligible memory,
and correctness matters more than a soft cap.
